english: Sometimes on the banks of the Kalindi river, producing music among the groves
roman: Kadachit Kalindi tata vipina sangita karavo

english: Enjoying like a bee the lotus-faces of the joyful Abhira women
roman: Muda bhiri nari vadana kamala asvada madhupah

english: Whose feet are worshipped by Lakshmi, Shambhu, Brahma, Indra and Ganesha
roman: Rama Shambhu Brahma amara pati Ganesha archita pado

english: May that Lord Jagannatha come before my eyes
roman: Jagannathah swami nayana patha gami bhavatu me

hindi: भुजे सव्ये वेणुं शिरसि शिखिपिञ्छं कटितटे,
english: In his left arm a flute, on his head a peacock feather, at his waist
roman: Bhuje savye venum shirasi shikhi pinchham kati tate

english: Silk at his waist, bestowing loving glances from the corners of his eyes to companions
roman: Dukoolam netrante sahachara kataksham cha vidadhat

english: Ever familiar with the playful life of beautiful Vrindavan
roman: Sada Shrimad Vrindavana vasati lila parichayo

english: May that Lord Jagannatha come before my eyes
roman: Jagannathah swami nayana patha gami bhavatu me

english: On the shore of the great ocean, on the golden beautiful blue-peaked hill
roman: Mahambhodes tire kanaka ruchire neela shikhare

english: Dwelling within the palace with his mighty brother Balabhadra
Standing between Subhadra, granting opportunity for service to all gods
roman: Subhadra madhyasthah sakala sura seva vasarado

english: May that Lord Jagannatha come before my eyes
roman: Jagannathah swami nayana patha gami bhavatu me
